name: Axis
long_description:
Axis is building an AI research platform for the commodities trading industry, allowing a trading desk to deploy models for monitoring strategies. 

Commodities make up a third of global goods exports, and physical commodities traders decide the movement and storage of metals, agricultural products, and energy across the globe. They trade in public markets and bilateral OTC agreements. Engaging in these markets is complexing, covering derivatives positioning, refinery data, storage inventory, import/exports, geopolitical events and more. 

Axis is building an AI driven analytical layer for these markets.
one_liner: An AI Trading System for Commodities Markets
